assertion_results.text: The review comment about transaction wrapping (id 30001) is classified as a code change request and triggers sub-task creation
assertion_results.evidence: review-30001.md states '## Classification: code change request' and '**Triggers sub-task creation:** Yes'. subtask-30001.md exists with the corresponding sub-task. report.md Review Comment Summary table confirms: '30001 | ... | Code change request | Created'.

assertion_results.text: The review comment about adding an index (id 30002) is classified as a code change request (or upgraded suggestion) and triggers sub-task creation
assertion_results.evidence: review-30002.md states '## Classification: code change request' and includes upgrade analysis: 'Upgraded from suggestion to **code change request**.' and '**Triggers sub-task creation:** Yes'. subtask-30002.md exists. report.md Review Comment Summary: '30002 | ... | Code change request (upgraded from suggestion) | Created'.

assertion_results.text: The nit comment about context message (id 30003) is classified as nit and does NOT trigger sub-task creation
assertion_results.evidence: review-30003.md states '## Classification: nit' and '**Triggers sub-task creation:** No'. No subtask-30003.md file exists in the outputs directory. report.md Review Comment Summary: '30003 | ... | Nit | None'.

assertion_results.text: The question comment about GET behavior (id 30004) is classified as question and does NOT trigger sub-task creation
assertion_results.evidence: review-30004.md states '## Classification: question' and '**Triggers sub-task creation:** No'. No subtask-30004.md file exists in the outputs directory. report.md Review Comment Summary: '30004 | ... | Question | None'.

assertion_results.text: Each sub-task description follows the task-description-template.md format: contains Repository, Description, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, and Acceptance Criteria sections (constraint 1.12)
assertion_results.evidence: subtask-30001.md contains sections: '## Repository' (trustify-backend), '## Description', '## Files to Modify', '## Implementation Notes', '## Acceptance Criteria'. subtask-30002.md contains sections: '## Repository' (trustify-backend), '## Description', '## Files to Modify', '## Implementation Notes', '## Acceptance Criteria'. Both sub-tasks have all required sections.

assertion_results.text: Each sub-task description includes a Target PR section with the PR URL https://github.com/trustify/trustify-backend/pull/744 (constraint 1.12)
assertion_results.evidence: subtask-30001.md contains '## Target PR' followed by 'https://github.com/trustify/trustify-backend/pull/744'. subtask-30002.md contains '## Target PR' followed by 'https://github.com/trustify/trustify-backend/pull/744'.

assertion_results.text: Each sub-task description includes a Review Context section with the original review comment text (constraint 1.12)
assertion_results.evidence: subtask-30001.md contains '## Review Context' with the quoted original comment: '> The soft_delete method should run all three UPDATE statements inside a single database transaction...' subtask-30002.md contains '## Review Context' with the quoted original comment: '> The migration should also add an index on deleted_at for the sbom table...'

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT modify any code files — it only reads, verifies, creates sub-task descriptions, and reports (constraint 1.11)
assertion_results.evidence: The outputs directory contains only classification files (review-30001.md through review-30004.md), sub-task description files (subtask-30001.md, subtask-30002.md), and report.md. No source code files (*.rs, *.toml, *.sql, etc.) are present in the outputs. The report and sub-tasks describe changes needed but do not implement them.

assertion_results.text: The skill reads and processes all PR review comments before generating findings (constraint 1.10)
assertion_results.evidence: All four review comments (30001-30004) have corresponding classification files (review-30001.md through review-30004.md). The report.md Review Comment Summary table lists all 4 comments with their classifications. The report processes all comments before rendering the overall verdict.

assertion_results.text: The report does NOT auto-merge the PR (constraint 1.13)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md states '### Overall: WARN' and 'Two code change requests require attention before merge'. There is no mention of merging, auto-merge, or approval in the report. The report creates sub-tasks for the code change requests rather than merging.

assertion_results.text: The report contains a Test Change Classification row with ADDITIVE — only new test files were added (tests/api/sbom_delete.rs is a new file)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md main table contains: '| Test Change Classification | ADDITIVE | tests/api/sbom_delete.rs is a new file with 5 new test functions — purely additive test coverage |'. The Domain Analysis section also confirms: 'Test Change Classification -- ADDITIVE tests/api/sbom_delete.rs is a new file (not present on the base branch)... This is purely additive test coverage.'

assertion_results.text: Convention upgrade eligibility is evaluated for review comment 30002 (index suggestion) — the review classification output (review-30002.md) or the report's Style/Conventions analysis explains whether the suggestion matches a documented or demonstrated project convention
assertion_results.evidence: review-30002.md contains a full '### Convention Upgrade Analysis' section with 3 checks: CONVENTIONS.md check, Codebase pattern check, and Performance-related scrutiny. The report.md Style/Conventions section contains 'Convention Upgrade -- WARN Comment 30002 (partial index on deleted_at) was evaluated for convention upgrade' with specific reasoning about database migration conventions and frequency of the query path.

assertion_results.text: Review comment 30002 (index suggestion) results in a sub-task regardless of classification path — whether classified directly as code change request based on reviewer language, or upgraded from suggestion via convention analysis
assertion_results.evidence: review-30002.md shows the comment was upgraded from suggestion to code change request via convention analysis: 'Upgrade decision: Upgraded from suggestion to code change request.' and 'Triggers sub-task creation: Yes'. subtask-30002.md exists with a complete sub-task description. report.md confirms: '30002 | ... | Code change request (upgraded from suggestion) | Created'.
